records.question: Which aircraft is the Robinson R-22 with max disk loading exactly 2.6 lb/ft² (14 kg/m²), described as a Light utility helicopter, and containing 497 ft² (46.2 m²) total disk area and 370 lb (635 kg) max gross weight?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT aircraft.aircraft_id FROM aircraft
JOIN airport_aircraft ON aircraft.aircraft_id = airport_aircraft.aircraft_id
WHERE aircraft.max_disk_loading = '2.6 lb/ft² (14 kg/m²)' AND aircraft.description = 'Light utility helicopter' AND aircraft.total_disk_area LIKE '%497 ft² (46.2 m²)%' AND aircraft.max_gross_weight LIKE '%370 lb (635 kg)%' AND aircraft.aircraft = 'Robinson R-22'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Aircraft_ID
FROM aircraft
WHERE Aircraft = 'Robinson R-22'
  AND Max_disk_Loading = '2.6 lb/ft² (14 kg/m²)'
  AND Description = 'Light utility helicopter'
  AND Total_disk_area = '497 ft² (46.2 m²)'
  AND Max_Gross_Weight = '370 lb (635 kg)'

SELECT aircraft.aircraft_id FROM aircraft
JOIN airport_aircraft ON aircraft.aircraft_id = airport_aircraft.aircraft_id
JOIN airport ON airport_aircraft.airport_id = airport.airport_id
WHERE airport.aircraft_movements = 478693.0 AND airport.domestic_passengers = 5562516.0 AND airport.freight_metric_tonnes = 1397054.0 AND aircraft.aircraft = 'Bell 206B3 JetRanger' AND airport.international_passengers >= 61344438.0 AND aircraft.max_disk_loading = '3.7 lb/ft² (18 kg/m²)'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT a.Aircraft_ID
FROM aircraft a
JOIN airport_aircraft aa ON a.Aircraft_ID = aa.Aircraft_ID
JOIN airport ap ON aa.Airport_ID = ap.Airport_ID
WHERE a.Aircraft = 'Bell 206B3 JetRanger'
  AND a.Max_disk_Loading = '3.7 lb/ft² (18 kg/m²)'
  AND ap.Aircraft_Movements = 478693.0
  AND ap.Domestic_Passengers = 5562516.0
  AND ap.Freight_Metric_Tonnes = 1397054.0
  AND ap.International_Passengers >= 61344438.0
